what: Function to plot a timeline graph across sampling days — KOSMOStimeplot
title: Function to plot a timeline graph across sampling days — KOSMOStimeplot
text: Creates timeline plot sampled days line per mesocosm. works excel datasheet following common KOSMOS layout, assuming continuous independent variable categorical variable two factors. current version limited work KOSMOS Kiel spring 2024 campaign.

title: Function to plot a timeline graph across sampling days — KOSMOStimeplot
code: KOSMOStimeplot(   dataset = KOSMOStestdata,   parameter = dimnames(dataset)[[2]][ncol(dataset)],   ylabel = parameter,   xlabel = "Experiment day",   control = "Fjord",   baseline = FALSE,   treatment.abline = FALSE,   ignore = FALSE,   startat0 = TRUE,   headspace = 0,   includeThisInYlimit = FALSE,   ylimit = FALSE,   xlimit = FALSE,   axis.tick = "xy",   axis.show = "xy",   stats.show = FALSE,   stats.days = FALSE,   stats.ignore = FALSE,   stats.digits = FALSE,   stats.location = "bottom",   stats.meanlabel = c("below", "above"),   stats.doublespecial = FALSE,   copepod.draw = FALSE,   copepod.position = "top",   new.plot = TRUE,   ... )

title: Function to plot a timeline graph across sampling days — KOSMOStimeplot
text: dataset data set object following common KOSMOS layout, .e. loaded standard excel data sheet. left empty, example dataset KOSMOStestdata plotted showcase function. parameter column name response variable plotted given string. Defaults last column data table. ylabel y-axis label printed. Defaults value parameter. xlabel x-axis label printed. Defaults "Experiment day". control sample stands experimental design, harbour fjord sample, shall plotted separate style. Name identifier "Mesocosm" "Treat_Meso" column. Defaults "Fjord" baseline (currently unavailable) treatment.abline treatment additions marked vertical lines? TRUE False. Defaults TRUE, means "yes". ignore List one multiple mesocosm numbers exclude plot, .e. c(1,3,10). startat0 y-axis start 0? Can TRUE (default) False. headspace space needed data lines include additional features labels? headspace enlarges y-axis range given factor (.e. 0.25) setting upper axis limit 125% original value. Defaults 0. includeThisInYlimit Set value want included range y-axis. value anyway falls within range nothing change, otherwise lower upper end Y-axis shifted accommodate . Can useful wish display certain thresholds reference values. ylimit Set fixed range y-axis following pattern c("lower end", "upper end"), .e. c(1,3). overwrites startat0, headspace, includeThisInYlimit. set FALSE (default), range defined based range data values. xlimit Set fixed range x-axis following pattern c("lower end", "upper end").  set FALSE (default), range include sampling days data table. axis.tick, axis.show options control whether axis ticks /labels displayed. can set NA ("show none"), "x" ("show x-axis"), "y" ("show y-axis"), "xy" (show ; default option). axis.tick set axis tick marks appear without labels, axis.tick axis.label labels printed next ticks. stats.show (made available next update) stats.days (made available next update) stats.ignore (made available next update) stats.digits (made available next update) stats.location (made available next update) stats.meanlabel (made available next update) stats.doublespecial (ask...) copepod.draw (outdated, unavailable) copepod.position (outdated, unavailable) new.plot set FALSE, plot plotted ontop existing, open plot rather creating new one. rather unstable prone unexpected results. ... arguments base-R plot-function can passed , setting title aspect ratio, well graphics parameters. Please check [base::plot()] [graphics::par()].

title: Function to plot a timeline graph across sampling days — KOSMOStimeplot
text: Directly outputs plot, either plot window another graphics device (e.g. .png file) connection opened.
